source_intake_record.raw_question_text:
Three $ \Delta $'s and a $ \diamondsuit $ will balance nine $ \bullet $'s. One $ \Delta $ will balance a $ \diamondsuit $ and a $ \bullet $.
<image1>

How many $ \bullet $'s will balance the two $ \diamondsuit $'s in this balance?
<image2>

This is a symbolic arithmetic/algebra word problem rather than a single direct lookup.

The balance relations can be translated into equations, so a rule-based verifier could recompute the result.
